programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into inventive eats; in Burlington, Vt., a funky joint cooking up mac and cheese pancakes; in Richmond, Va., going gangbusters with grits; artistic eatery in Ottawa, Canada.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: A taste of Philadelphia; funky malt house serving Buffalo wings; Polish twist on the cheesesteak; longtime tavern making mama's real deal Italian recipes; mother-daughter trio cookin' up authentic Indonesian specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri road trips across America to check out classic greasy spoons; with a new generation of owners and delicious homemade food, these are the kind of places that make America special.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Two brothers-in-law carry on a decades-long seafood tradition; a mother-son duo running a breakfast, lunch and dinner joint in honor of their Pop; father-son meat masters firing up killer char-becue.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: A Southern-style chicken sandwich and hush puppies in Portland, Ore.; three sisters put a unique spin on pizza in Oklahoma City, Okla.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri tracks down off-the-chain chicken, starting in Salt Lake City with a unique curry chicken mashup; in Albuquerque, N.M., the chicken is down-home fried alongside sweet waffles; in Grand Junction, Colo., it's nested in tacos with guacamole.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbing big flavor in some unexpected spots; there are south-of-the-border classics cooked up in Calgary, culinary masterpieces in a Memphis museum and an authentic British pub tucked away at a tiny Colorado airport.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is getting into the funkiest of flavors; in Atlanta, two pals are serving up prime-time patty melt empanadas and a bakery in Los Angeles is plating craveable khachapuri.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: A sandwich shop serving up tastes of Peru in Hollywood, Fla.; a pierogi palace in Philadelphia giving a fresh take on Polish specialties; a wood-fired pizza spot putting its own spin on pies in Fargo, N.D.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In California, Guy takes Marc Summers to check out fried rice in a bowl and burrito; then, he's off to Vegas with Hunter for real deal Jamaican and to Florida for lobster meatballs and pork cheek empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's visiting restaurants owned by familiar Food Network faces; in Studio City, Calif., chef Antonia Lofaso is cooking up global flavors, and in Rapid City, S.D., chef Justin Warner is serving up righteous ramen and dynamite dumplings.
